payload.answer: Sam is no longer at Goldman; he left last month and joined Point72. He still listens to Bill Evans, but lately more early Coltrane. He’s open to catching up about AI infra and wants the article sent over.
citations: Daniele: Still at Goldman? Sam: No, I left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Daniele: Still listening to Bill Evans? Sam: Yes, but lately more early Coltrane.
Daniele: We should catch up about AI infra. Sam: Definitely, send me that article.

entity_resolution.reason: No prior entity context provided; no resolution needed.

Sam said he still listens to Bill Evans, though lately more early Coltrane.

repair_options: If needed, store Goldman as former employer rather than current.
